'''Drosh Khalii''' was a member of the [[Intendant caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. After the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]] and the terraforming of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] into [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]], Khalii was appointed [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] of the [[Gileng Sector|Geling Sector]], becoming very powerful in the process. [[Nom Anor]], as the Prophet [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]], decided that Khalii should be brought down. Using the [[Priestess/Legends|Priestess]] [[Ngaaluh]], he inserted [[Shamed Ones]] spreading the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' heresy]] into Khalii's household. Khalii was executed, and his corpse was thrown to the [[yargh'un pit]]s, as the evidence against Khalii was airtight—a little too perfect, in [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra's]] eyes.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1stm}}
